title: Ireland’s pharma sector records highest employment, exports and tax receipts [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Pharmaceuticals are a core driver of the Irish economy, with pharma exports representing 41 per cent of GNI, and shipments to the US accounting for 25 per cent, according to a new report
summary_public: Pharmaceuticals are a core driver of the Irish economy, with pharma exports representing 41 per cent of GNI, and shipments to the US accounting for 25 per cent, according to a new report
